articles.title: Dem senators dodge crucial question on illegal alien accused of killing Chicago college student
articles.summary: After Sheridan Gorman's killing, several Democratic senators declined to clearly say whether the illegal immigrant charged in the case should have been deported

articles.title: Too loud? Ticket’s in the mail
articles.summary: Noise cameras are spreading across U.S. cities, issuing automatic tickets up to $2,500. NYC has already collected nearly $2 million in fines since 2021.

articles.title: House Republicans pass rival DHS plan, setting up Senate fight as shutdown set to become longest in history
articles.summary: House Republicans passed a two-month DHS funding extension, but the 42-day partial government shutdown remains far from over amid continued gridlock.

articles.title: Tiger Woods released from jail after DUI arrest; eyes appear bloodshot in booking photo
articles.summary: Tiger Woods was released from jail Friday night after several hours after he was arrested for driving under the influence following a car crash near his Florida home.

articles.title: Controversial viral influencer 'Clavicular' arrested in Florida on battery charges
articles.summary: "Looksmaxxing" influencer Braden Peters known as "Clavicular" arrested and facing battery charges after alleged Airbnb incident in February.

articles.title: At least 2 students killed, several injured in school bus crash in Tennessee: 'A parent's worst nightmare'
articles.summary: Two students were killed and seven were injured in a school bus crash on Highway 70 in Carroll County, Tennessee, during a Kenwood Middle School field trip.

articles.title: Trump touts progress in Iran talks and success in Venezuela, says 'Cuba is next'
articles.summary: President says "Cuba is next" after Iran negotiations, success in Venezuela and talks renaming the Strait of Hormuz the "Strait of Trump" at a Miami Beach summit.

articles.title: Sportscaster Jim Gray says Tiger Woods' DUI arrest is 'another cry for help'
articles.summary: Fox News contributor and sportscaster Jim Gray called Tiger Woods' DUI arrest a "cry for help," saying the golfer's troubling pattern raises questions about who surrounds him.

articles.title: Carville doubles down on theory Trump will 'walk away' from office after midterms, get pardon from JD Vance
articles.summary: Carville doubled down on his theory that Trump will resign after the midterms, suggesting Trump will seek a pardon from JD Vance to avoid potential prosecutions after leaving office.

articles.title: Captain hauls in nearly 500-pound sea giant after grueling battle, feeds most of town
articles.summary: Captain Jose Rodriguez Jr. caught a massive 480-pound swordfish in the Florida Keys, fighting the trophy fish for five hours on a deep-sea fishing charter as a family watched.

articles.title: Watchdog blasts BBC, CNN, NYT for applying 'war crime' label almost exclusively to US, Israel in Iran conflict
articles.summary: A media watchdog claims 88% of war crime references in Iran conflict coverage by CNN, BBC and others targeted the U.S. or Israel, with none aimed at Iran.

articles.title: LA United School District scandal leads to charges as $22M scheme allegedly drained funds meant for students

articles.title: Chicago-area student paper unveils ICE tracker days after illegal migrant charged in Sheridan Gorman's murder
articles.summary: Dominican University's Dominican Star newspaper launched an ICE tracker just days after an illegal immigrant was charged in the murder of 18-year-old Loyola student Sheridan Gorman.

articles.title: Andrew Garfield warns fans against watching 'Harry Potter,' calls Rowling ‘she that shall remain nameless’
articles.summary: Andrew Garfield said watching Harry Potter films is now "controversial," accusing J.K. Rowling of supporting 'inhumane' causes in a recent radio interview.

articles.title: Former UNC basketball star Kenny Smith reacts to Hubert Davis' firing, shuts down coaching job interest
articles.summary: Former UNC star Kenny Smith said talk of him potentially taking the Tar Heels’ coaching job is “disrespectful." He added that the next coach should want to retire at Chapel Hill.

articles.title: Trump reacts to Tiger Woods' rollover crash as golfer faces DUI charge: ‘Very close friend of mine’
articles.summary: Tiger Woods was arrested on a DUI charge weeks before the Masters, and President Donald Trump called the 15-time major winner a close friend in response to the car crash.

articles.title: Pima County deputy accused of kidnapping woman in custody, fired from department investigating Guthrie case
articles.summary: Travis Reynolds, a 22-year-old Arizona deputy, faces a kidnapping charge after allegedly exploiting a detainee while on duty. His bond was set at $200,000.

articles.title: Former Raiders All-Pro center Barret Robbins dead at 52: 'Deeply saddened'
articles.summary: Former Oakland Raiders All-Pro center Barret Robbins has died at age 52, former teammate Tim Brown announced in a message on social media.

articles.summary: A federal judge's ruling paused an effort to sideline Anthropic while drawing backlash and support over the judiciary's role in Pentagon policy.

articles.title: Defiant Iran vows to fight 'until complete victory,' despite heavy military losses
